history.content:
<thought>
I am at the left side of the open corridor on the second row, facing right (`>`). The goal `G` is down and to the right, and moving forward would immediately step into lava (`L`), so I need to change direction to go around the obstacle. Turning down is the safest next step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down (`v`) at the left side. To reach the goal in the lower-right, I need to move down along the left edge, but the cell directly below is open, so I can advance safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down and the cell directly ahead is still open. Continuing downward keeps me progressing along the safe left side toward the bottom corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing down, and the path ahead remains open. I should keep moving forward to get closer to the bottom corridor and then the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down with open space ahead, so the safest progress is to continue straight toward the lower corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing down, but the cell directly ahead is lava, so I must avoid moving forward. To reach the goal on the right, I should turn right to face toward the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing left, but there is a wall immediately to the left, so moving forward is not possible. I should turn right twice over future steps to head toward the open path, starting by turning right now.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up, and the cell ahead is open floor. Moving forward is safe and keeps me progressing toward the open area and then the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up with open floor directly ahead, so the best next step is to continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing up, but moving forward would take me toward the upper corridor, while the goal is lower-right. I should turn right to face east and head toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right in an open corridor. The goal is to the lower-right, so moving forward will bring me closer along the clear path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
